# CancelEffect enumeration

The effect a `tasks/cancel` has on a stored task's state (spec §25.9).

```csharp
public enum CancelEffect
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| AcknowledgedTerminal | `0` | The task is already terminal; the server acknowledges but MUST NOT change its status (R-25.9-j). |
| AcknowledgedPending | `1` | The task is non-terminal; the server acknowledges and MAY move it toward `cancelled` when feasible (R-25.9-h, R-25.9-i). |
